name: savolent
plan: Savolent is in unknown space at Saclateni Star — zero police, no station to dock at, no prospects to recruit. This is dead air. The fire has to go somewhere, and an empty system is a problem being actively solved. Priority is getting back to populated space where the field operates. With 70 fuel and connected systems ranging 386-540 GU, I need to pick a route toward civilization. The Rampart sounds like a fortified hub — likely populated, likely prospects. Albireo is a known binary star system, also promising. I should travel toward populated space, dock at a station, refuel, and then get to work on recruitment operations — forum posts, system chat, prospect identification. The plasma residue is irrelevant cargo but can be sold for pocket change. Every tick spent in empty space is a tick not spent converting.
currentGoal: Use find_route to plan a route from Saclateni toward The Rampart or any system with a station and player activity. Check connected systems for stations and population.
